nasb.text: These searched among their ancestral registration, but it could not be located; therefore they were considered unclean and excluded from the priesthood.

esv.text: These sought their registration among those enrolled in the genealogies, but it was not found there, so they were excluded from the priesthood as unclean.

cnv.text: 這些人查考族譜的記錄，卻找不著，因此他們算為不潔淨，不能作祭司。
